members.name: _BreakpointSetInTree
members.signature: public void _BreakpointSetInTree(Script script, int line, bool enabled)
members.summary: Override this method to be notified when a breakpoint is set in the editor.

members.name: _BreakpointsClearedInTree
members.summary: Override this method to be notified when all breakpoints are cleared in the editor.

members.name: _Capture
members.signature: public bool _Capture(String message, Array data, int sessionId)
members.summary: Override this method to process incoming messages. The [param session_id] is the ID of the [EditorDebuggerSession] that received the [param message]. Use [method get_session] to retrieve the session. This method should return [code]true[/code] if the message is recognized.

members.name: _GotoScriptLine
members.summary: Override this method to be notified when a breakpoint line has been clicked in the debugger breakpoint panel.

members.name: _HasCapture
members.summary: Override this method to enable receiving messages from the debugger. If [param capture] is "my_message" then messages starting with "my_message:" will be passed to the [method _capture] method.

members.name: _SetupSession
members.summary: Override this method to be notified whenever a new [EditorDebuggerSession] is created. Note that the session may be inactive during this stage.

members.name: GetSession
members.summary: Returns the [EditorDebuggerSession] with the given [param id].

members.name: GetSessions
members.summary: Returns an array of [EditorDebuggerSession] currently available to this debugger plugin. [b]Note:[/b] Sessions in the array may be inactive, check their state via [method EditorDebuggerSession.is_active].

virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to be notified when a breakpoint is set in the editor.
